hero.title: We're bringing in BDO, The partner's already on it.

about.body:
BDO in Viet Nam consists of member firms of BDO International – the world’s fifth largest network of professional services firms, providing audit, advisory and tax services to clients ranging from long-established multinational groups to fast-growing organisations, both listed and privately owned. With 1,800 offices in 166 countries, BDO International has more than 119,611 professionals worldwide.

On 1 October 2012, more than 150 professionals from several firms in Viet Nam joined to form the new BDO firm in Viet Nam with offices in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City. This marked a comprehensive expansion of the services BDO provides in Viet Nam, including audit, tax, accounting, business services & outsourcing, advisory and legal services delivered by a highly regarded team of experts in the local market.

We think globally and act locally. Every market has its own characteristics, and businesses operating there need advice from local professionals who deeply understand the business environment and local culture to help them operate more effectively. Leveraging the knowledge and extensive experience of other member firms in BDO’s global network, we work alongside businesses, delivering tailored solutions that meet their needs across multiple sectors and markets.

items.title: Audit and Assurance Services
items.description: As a member of one of the largest global professional networks, we combine worldwide resources with deep local knowledge of Vietnamese business practices and regulations. With a highly qualified team and extensive experience serving clients across many industries and business models, we are committed to delivering outstanding value on every engagement.

items.title: Business Services & Outsourcing (BSO)
items.description: BDO’s Business Services & Outsourcing team provides a wide range of services including accounting, advisory and compliance support to help organizations grow and respond to changing business needs in Viet Nam and around the world.

items.title: Tax Services
items.description: Our experienced tax professionals understand that tax services should create value for your business. In an environment of increasing regulatory complexity and frequent changes to tax legislation, we help you stay compliant while optimising your tax position. Our team has broad expertise across all major tax areas and sectors.

items.title: Advisory Services
items.description: With a multi-disciplinary advisory team drawn from diverse backgrounds, BDO delivers tailored solutions for each client. Our advisory offering ranges from transaction services and corporate finance to risk advisory, restructuring and technology consulting, helping you navigate challenges and seize opportunities of any size.

items.title: Legal Services
items.description: BDO Legal Vietnam is an independent law firm within the BDO network in Viet Nam, providing professional legal services to investors and businesses across a wide range of corporate and commercial matters.
